icon.description: PayTrust app icon, teal background with white PT monogram
icon.use: watermark, brand presence on any scene

logo.description: PayTrust logo with icon and wordmark on teal background
logo.use: splash screens, CTA scenes, brand-forward moments

scenes.shows: Hand holding phone with PayTrust dashboard showing GHS 50,000 balance, ongoing transactions
scenes.best_for: solution scene — proving the app works, money is visible and secure

scenes.shows: Hand holding phone with wallet view, peer-to-peer transaction and escrow tagline
scenes.best_for: solution scene — explaining what PayTrust does

scenes.shows: Clean phone mockup with PayTrust welcome screen, worry-free transactions tagline
scenes.best_for: CTA scene — inviting new users, clean and inviting

scenes.shows: Transaction creation flow with buyer/seller selection, payment sent and received confirmations
scenes.best_for: solution scene — showing how a transaction works step by step

scenes.shows: Transaction list with progress bars, ongoing deals with amounts in GHS
scenes.best_for: solution scene — trust through transparency, tracking every cedi

scenes.shows: Withdrawal screen sending GHS 5,000 to MTN Mobile Money
scenes.best_for: solution scene — showing money access, real MoMo integration

scenes.shows: Transaction history showing completed deals with dates and amounts
scenes.best_for: solution scene — record keeping, proof of transactions

scenes.shows: Notification center showing transaction confirmations, wallet linked, new transactions
scenes.best_for: solution scene — staying informed, nothing happens without your knowledge
